channel.title: Generative AI on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Generative AI on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Protect sensitive generative AI telemetry in Application Insights and Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Application Insights now stores generative AI content in a dedicated GenAIContent table (AppGenAIContent in Log Analytics), enabling access controls for sensitive AI telemetry. The update is in public preview.

  • Source: Azure Updates
